title: Create: Unify updated to Create 6
description: A mod that updates Create: Unify to Create 6
body:
**This mod does not use or redistribute any assets from Create: Unify.**

This is a simple mod designed to make [Create: Unify](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-unify) compatable with Create 6. It uses mixins to achieve this and includes none of Unifys original assets. It functions with the latest version of Create (6.0.5) and Create: Unify (1.0a) and fixes a bug that would make it so people can’t join a server with this mod. Create: Unify is a mod that adds many different materials to the game, allowing for unification of ores from many different mods.

**Disclaimer:** This mod has not been tested extensively. While it should function alongside most mods, compatibility is not guaranteed.
